final_prompt.prompt:
Create a professional documentary-style banner image for Weibo news/hot topic coverage, 16:9 aspect ratio.

Style/medium: documentary street photography, high-end mobile phone capture aesthetic, sharp details with authentic on-site presence
Composition: wide panoramic horizontal frame, generous negative space for text overlay, city skyline stretching across frame
Subject: urban cityscape at dusk with silhouettes of hurried pedestrians, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: city skyline at golden hour transitioning to night, neon lights beginning to illuminate, dramatic light and shadow contrast
Lighting/mood: sunset backlighting with warm golden hour glow on building facades, emerging neon accents, high contrast between warm sky and cool shadows
Color palette: warm orange-gold sunset tones against deepening blue-purple twilight sky, punctuated by neon pink and cyan accents
Text (verbatim): "城市里的安静时刻", "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙", "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察"
Constraints: horizontal banner format with ample留白 for text placement, professional editorial quality suitable for social media news coverage
Avoid: 8K stuffer aesthetic, oversaturated HDR look, deformed architecture, plastic skin on pedestrians, watermark other than specified text, tilted horizon
